description_long: This is a large rectangular cardboard parcel, typically used for shipping or storage in urban environments. The box is constructed from corrugated brown cardboard, giving it a slightly textured, matte appearance. A single strip of beige packing tape runs along the top and partially down one side, securing the flaps and indicating it is sealed. The box is unmarked, with no visible labels, logos, or writing, and all surfaces are clean and undamaged. Its size suggests it could contain medium to large items, making it suitable for deliveries or moving purposes. The overall construction appears sturdy, designed to protect its contents during handling and transport.
description: A large, sealed brown cardboard box with a strip of beige packing tape, unmarked and sturdy for shipping or storage.
description_view_0: The front and top faces of the box are visible, with a prominent strip of beige tape running from the top down the front side.
description_view_1: The left and top faces are shown, with the tape visible on the top and partially down the left edge.
description_view_2: The right and top faces are visible, with the tape only seen on the top surface, and no tape on the right side.
description_view_3: The rear and top faces are visible, with the tape seen only on the top surface, and the rear face completely plain.
